title: Ambient obstruction scaffold
summary: Stores even-dimensional obstruction-order data, a symmetric component tensor, and an abstract proposition representing vanishing of the obstruction.

mathematicalContent.heading: Critical even order
mathematicalContent.body: For an even base dimension n, the formal obstruction appears at order n/2 in the ambient expansion. AmbientObstructionData records that this order lies within the available finite jet.

mathematicalContent.heading: Stored obstruction data
mathematicalContent.body: The structure contains a two-index component function O, a proof that it is symmetric, and a separate proposition called vanishing. The code does not define O from the Ricci recursion, nor does it identify vanishing with the componentwise equation O = 0.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The critical order is defined by natural-number division n/2; the evenness assumption is carried later by AmbientObstructionData.
This structure stores n, a proof that n is even, availability of order n/2 in the jet, a component tensor ℱᵢⱼ, its symmetry, and an abstract proposition named vanishing.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: O=\left(n,\ n\equiv0\!\pmod2,\ \frac n2\le K,\ \mathcal O_{ij},\ \mathcal O_{ij}=\mathcal O_{ji},\ \operatorname{vanishing}\right).

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: This accessor returns the two-index component function stored as the obstruction tensor.
correspondence.leanType: def obstructionTensor (O : AmbientObstructionData (ι := ι) J) : Sym2Component ι

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The stored obstruction tensor is symmetric because symmetry is a field of AmbientObstructionData.
correspondence.leanType: theorem obstructionTensor_symmetric (O : AmbientObstructionData (ι := ι) J) : SymmetricComponent O.obstructionTensor

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal unobstructedness is defined to be the abstract vanishing proposition stored in O.
correspondence.leanType: def IsUnobstructed (O : AmbientObstructionData (ι := ι) J) : Prop

references.note: Mathematical source for the critical order n/2 and the ambient obstruction tensor.

limitations: The obstruction tensor and its vanishing are supplied as independent fields. The file proves neither that the tensor arises from the FG recursion nor that vanishing is equivalent to componentwise zero, trace-freeness, divergence-freeness, conformal covariance, or continuation of the ambient expansion.
